Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Caterpie during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokémon may appear in Max Battles throughout Tales of Transformation. They will also take over Power Spots for an hour each week on Mondays from 6:00 p.m. to 7:00 p.m. local time!
On January 12, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokémon is Caterpie.
- Caterpie

Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Beldum during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokémon may appear in Max Battles throughout Tales of Transformation. They will also take over Power Spots for an hour each week on Mondays from 6:00 p.m. to 7:00 p.m. local time!
On January 19, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokémon is Beldum.
- Beldum

Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Roggenrola during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokémon may appear in Max Battles throughout Tales of Transformation. They will also take over Power Spots for an hour each week on Mondays from 6:00 p.m. to 7:00 p.m. local time!
On January 26, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokémon is Roggenrola.
- Roggenrola

GO Battle League.title: Ultra League and Sunshine Cup: Great League Edition | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Ultra League and Sunshine Cup: Great League Edition will run from January 6, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to January 13, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Normal-, Fire-, Grass-, and Ground-type Pokémon are eligible.
- Charizard is not allowed.
The following Pokémon will not be allowed.
- Charizard

GO Battle League.title: Master Premier and Retro Cup: Great League Edition | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Master Premier and Retro Cup: Great League Edition will run from January 13, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to January 20, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- No CP limit.
- Legendary Pokémon, Mythical Pokémon, and Ultra Beasts are not eligible.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Dark-, Steel-, and Fairy-type Pokémon are not eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League and Ultra Premier | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League and Ultra Premier will run from January 20, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to January 27, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Legendary Pokémon, Mythical Pokémon, and Ultra Beasts are not eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from January 27, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to February 3, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- All Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Ultra League and 2026 Championship Series Cup | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Ultra League and 2026 Championship Series Cup will run from February 3, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to February 10, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Bug-, Dark-, Normal-, and Dragon-type Pokémon are eligible.
- Fighting-, Flying-, and Steel-type Pokémon are not eligible.
- Legendary Pokémon, Mythical Pokémon, Mega Pokémon, and Ultra Beasts are not eligible.
- The following Pokémon will be allowed: Seaking, Politoed, Milotic, and Froslass.
The following Pokémon will not be allowed.
- Wigglytuff
- Chansey
- Crustle
- Diggersby
- Ribombee
- Araquanid
- Turtonator
- Morgrem
- Morpeko

GO Battle League.title: Master League and 2026 Championship Series Cup | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Master League and 2026 Championship Series Cup will run from February 10, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to February 17, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- All Pokémon are eligible.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Bug-, Dark-, Normal-, and Dragon-type Pokémon are eligible.
- Fighting-, Flying-, and Steel-type Pokémon are not eligible.
- Legendary Pokémon, Mythical Pokémon, Mega Pokémon, and Ultra Beasts are not eligible.
- The following Pokémon will be allowed: Seaking, Politoed, Milotic, and Froslass.
The following Pokémon will not be allowed.
- Wigglytuff
- Chansey
- Crustle
- Diggersby
- Ribombee
- Araquanid
- Turtonator
- Morgrem
- Morpeko

GO Battle League.title: Great League and Love Cup: Great League Edition | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League and Love Cup: Great League Edition will run from February 17, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to February 24, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only red- or pink-colored Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League: Mega Edition | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League: Mega Edition will run from February 24, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to March 3, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- No CP limit.
- Mega-Evolved Pokémon are allowed.

Pokémon Spotlight Hour.title: Mareep Spotlight Hour
Pokémon Spotlight Hour.description:
Pokémon Spotlight Hour will feature a different Pokémon and special bonus for one hour at 6:00 p.m. local time on Tuesday during the month of January.
January 13: The featured Pokémon is Mareep and the special bonus is 2× Evolution XP.

Pokémon Spotlight Hour.title: Hatenna Spotlight Hour
Pokémon Spotlight Hour.description:
Pokémon Spotlight Hour will feature a different Pokémon and special bonus for one hour at 6:00 p.m. local time on Tuesday during the month of January.
January 20: The featured Pokémon is Hatenna and the special bonus is 2× Transfer Candy.

Pokémon Spotlight Hour.title: Foongus Spotlight Hour
Pokémon Spotlight Hour.description:
Pokémon Spotlight Hour will feature a different Pokémon and special bonus for one hour at 6:00 p.m. local time on Tuesday during the month of January.
January 27: The featured Pokémon is Foongus and the special bonus is 2× Catch Stardust.

Raid Hour.title: Genesect (Burn Drive), Genesect (Chill Drive) Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description: A Raid Hour featuring Genesect (Burn Drive), Genesect (Chill Drive) is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

Raid Hour.title: Thundurus (Incarnate Forme) Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description: A Raid Hour featuring Thundurus (Incarnate Forme) is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

Raid Hour.title: Tornadus (Incarnate Forme) Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description: A Raid Hour featuring Tornadus (Incarnate Forme) is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

PokéStop Showcase.title: Rock-type Pokémon PokéStop Showcases
PokéStop Showcase.description: There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Rock-type Pokémon. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!

Raid Battles.title: Genesect (Burn Drive), Genesect (Chill Drive) in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Genesect (Burn Drive) and Genesect (Chill Drive) will be in five-star raid battles from January 5, 2026 to January 16, 2026.
There will also be Raid Hours featuring Genesect (Burn Drive) and Genesect (Chill Drive) from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following dates:
- January 7
- January 14

Raid Battles.title: Mega Blaziken in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Blaziken return to Mega Raids on January 5, 2026, at 10 am local time.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Sceptile in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Sceptile return to Mega Raids on January 16, 2026, at 10 am local time.

Raid Battles.title: Thundurus (Incarnate Forme) in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Thundurus (Incarnate Forme) will be in five-star raid battles from January 16, 2026 to January 25, 2026.
There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Thundurus (Incarnate Forme) from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- January 21

Raid Battles.title: Shadow Cresselia in Shadow Raids
Raid Battles.description:
Shadow Cresselia will appear in Pokémon GO in Shadow Raids. If you’re lucky you’ll be able to encounter Shiny Shadow Cresselia!
Shadow Cresselia will appear in five-star Shadow Raids every weekend from January 2 to February 1:
- January 3 - January 4
- January 10 - January 11
- January 17 - January 18
- January 24 - January 25
- January 31 - February 1

Raid Battles.title: Mega Ampharos in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Ampharos return to Mega Raids on January 25, 2026, at 10 am local time.

Raid Battles.title: Tornadus (Incarnate Forme) in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Tornadus (Incarnate Forme) will be in five-star raid battles from January 25, 2026 to February 4, 2026.
There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Tornadus (Incarnate Forme) from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- January 28

Community Day.title: Grookey Community Day

bonuses: 1-hour Lures*
2x Catch Candy
2x Chance to receive Candy XL from catching Pokémon
3-hour Incense
3x Catch Stardust
Increased Spawns
One additional Special Trade can be made for a maximum of three for the day*
Trades made will require 50% less Stardust*

Community Day.description: Grookey, the Chimp Pokémon, will be featured during January Community Day!

Community Day.title: February Community Day
Community Day.description: February Community Day is on February 1, 2026. Stay tuned for the announcement of the featured Pokémon.

Event.title: High Zaptitude

bonuses: 1/2 Egg Hatch Distance when Eggs are placed in an Incubator during the event period
2× Stardust for catching Pokémon
2× Stardust for hatching Pokémon
2× XP for catching Pokémon
2× XP for hatching Pokémon
Increased chance to hatch Shiny Tadbulb

Event.description: Charge up for the High Zaptitude event to unlock Wattrel’s debut!

Event.title: Precious Pals

bonuses: Additional Candy XL when walking with your Buddy Pokémon
Earn additional hearts with your Buddy Pokémon
Increased chance to encounter Shiny Goldeen
Increased chance to hatch Shiny Goldeen and Shiny Fidough

Event.description: Make memories with your Buddy Pokémon during the Precious Pals event!

Event.title: Into the Depths
Event.description: The Into the Depths event will take place from January 27, 2026 at 10 am to February 1, 2026 at 8 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Event.title: Catch Mastery Day
Event.description: The Catch Mastery Day event will take place on February 7, 2026 from 10 am to 8 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Raid Day.title: Shadow Raid Day
Raid Day.description: The Shadow Raid Day event will take place on January 24, 2026 from 2 pm to 5 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Raid Day.title: Raid Day
Raid Day.description: The Raid Day event will take place on February 14, 2026 from 2 pm to 5 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Team GO Rocket.title: Precious Pals: Taken Over
Team GO Rocket.description: The Precious Pals: Taken Over event will take place from January 23, 2026 at 10 am to January 25, 2026 at 8 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Max Battles.title: Dynamax Weekend
Max Battles.description: The Dynamax Weekend event will take place from January 31, 2026 at 10 am to February 1, 2026 at 8 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Max Battles.title: Max Battle Day
Max Battles.description: The Max Battle Day event will take place on February 15, 2026 from 2 pm to 5 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

GO Pass.title: GO Pass: January

bonuses: 2× Daily Adventure Incense duration
Additional rewards for completing in-person raids and Max Battles
Hold 10 more Gifts in your Item Bag
Hold up to 20 more Gifts in your Item Bag
Open up to 40 Gifts per day
Open up to 50 Gifts per day
Receive up to 125 Gifts per day from spinning PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs
Receive up to 150 Gifts per day from spinning PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs

GO Pass.description:
Dialga and the Lucky Trinket return for GO Pass: January!
From Tuesday, January 6, at 10:00 a.m. to Tuesday, February 3, at 10:00 a.m. local time, the GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe for January will be available in Pokémon GO!

Pokémon GO Tour.title: Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos - Tainan 2026

bonuses: 1/2 Hatch Distance for Eggs placed in Incubators during the event
1/2 Stardust cost for trades
1/4 Egg Hatch Distance*
3 additional Candy XL for catching Pokémon in five-star and Mega raids (Trainers level 31+)
3× Hatch Candy
3× Hatch Stardust
3× Hatch XP
5,000 additional XP awarded for completed raids
6 additional Candy for catching Pokémon in five-star and Mega raids
Increased chance of 10 km Eggs from spinning PokéStops and Photo Discs at Gyms
Increased chance of encountering Shiny Pokémon
Up to 18 daily Raid Passes per day from spinning Photo Discs at Gyms
Up to 6 Special Trades can be made during your ticketed event day
Up to 9 daily Raid Passes per day from spinning Photo Discs at Gyms

Pokémon GO Tour.description:
Location: Tainan Metropolitan Park, Tainan, Taiwan
Dates: February 20–22, 2026
Time: 9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. GMT+8
Ticket Price: NT $733 (Early Bird, regular $818) – Early Bird Discount available through December 31
Experience an exclusive in-person Pokémon GO event in Tainan! Inspired by a place where dreams and adventures begin, Pokémon GO Tour is bringing the Kalos region to life in Tainan. Embark on a journey of beauty and bonds as you collect Pokémon, discover legendary stories, and experience the community of Pokémon GO in-person.
All event gameplay is exclusive to ticket holders. You will only be able to experience the event gameplay within Tainan Metropolitan Park during the date and time noted on your event ticket.
Other Event Locations:
- Los Angeles
- Tainan (this page)
- Global
Buy tickets: Pokémon GO Tour Website

Pokémon GO Tour.title: Mega Night at Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos - Tainan 2026

bonuses: 2× Candy for catching Pokémon
Additional 5,000 XP from completed raids
Chance of Mega Energy from spinning PokéStops and Photo Discs at Gyms

Pokémon GO Tour.description:
Location: Tainan Metropolitan Park, Tainan, Taiwan
Dates: February 20, 21, 22, 2026
Time: 5:00 p.m. – 7:00 p.m. GMT+8
Ticket Price: NT$529.00
An all-new nighttime celebration is coming to Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos!
Attendees may purchase this ticket as an addition to their primary Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos – Tainan ticket. Add-on tickets are NT$529.00 (or the equivalent pricing tier in your local currency, plus any applicable taxes and fees) and are available for purchase on the Pokémon GO Tour website. Event gameplay will be available only at the date, time, and location specified on your ticket.
Note: Tickets to this event are nonrefundable (subject to applicable law and the exceptions set forth in the Terms of Service). Tickets are first come, first served and are available for purchase while supplies last.
- Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos - Tainan 2026
It’s a night of fun, friends, and Pokémon adventures!
For the first time ever, we’re excited to offer a new nighttime event experience at Pokémon GO Tour, available to purchase as an add-on to your main event ticket. Mega Night is a ticketed evening event, taking place after the main daytime Pokémon GO Tour event.
Look forward to unique gameplay, special entertainment and more during this “after hours” extravaganza!
All event gameplay is exclusive to Mega Night ticket holders.
Please note: You will only be able to experience the event gameplay within Tainan Metropolitan Park during the date and time noted on your add-on ticket.

bonuses: 1/2 Hatch Distance for Eggs placed in Incubators during the event

Pokémon GO Tour.description:
Location: Rose Bowl Stadium, Los Angeles, United States
Dates: February 20–22, 2026
Time: 9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. PST
Ticket Price: US $30.00 (Early Bird $25.00 through December 31) – Early Bird Discount available through December 31
Experience an exclusive in-person Pokémon GO event in Los Angeles! Inspired by a place where dreams and adventures begin, Pokémon GO Tour is bringing the Kalos region to life in Los Angeles. Embark on a journey of beauty and bonds as you collect Pokémon, discover legendary stories, and experience the community of Pokémon GO in-person.
All event gameplay is exclusive to ticket holders. You will only be able to experience the event gameplay within Rose Bowl Stadium during the date and time noted on your event ticket.
Other Event Locations:
- Los Angeles (this page)
- Tainan
- Global
Buy tickets: Pokémon GO Tour Website
Price:
- Regular: US $30.00
- Early Bird Special: US $25.00 (through December 31)
Note:
- Tickets are US $30.00 (or the equivalent pricing tier in your local currency, plus any applicable taxes and fees)
- Event gameplay is EXCLUSIVE to ticket holders
- Event gameplay only available within Rose Bowl Stadium during specified date and time
- Tickets are nonrefundable (subject to applicable law)
- First come, first served while supplies last
Tickets include one day of event gameplay. Attendees may purchase add-ons that extend citywide gameplay for an additional day.

bonuses: 2× Candy for catching Pokémon
Additional 5,000 XP from completed raids
Chance of Mega Energy from spinning PokéStops and Photo Discs at Gyms

Pokémon GO Tour.description:
Location: Rose Bowl Stadium and Brookside Golf Course, Los Angeles, United States
Dates: February 20, 21, 22, 2026
Time: 6:00 p.m. – 8:00 p.m. PST
Ticket Price: US $20.00
An all-new nighttime celebration is coming to Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos!
Attendees may purchase this ticket as an addition to their primary Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos – Los Angeles ticket. Add-on tickets are US$20.00 (or the equivalent pricing tier in your local currency, plus any applicable taxes and fees) and are available for purchase on the Pokémon GO Tour website. Event gameplay will be available only at the date, time, and location specified on your ticket.
Note: Tickets to this event are nonrefundable (subject to applicable law and the exceptions set forth in the Terms of Service). Tickets are first come, first served and are available for purchase while supplies last.
- Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos - Los Angeles 2026
It’s a night of fun, friends, and Pokémon adventures!
For the first time ever, we’re excited to offer a new nighttime event experience at Pokémon GO Tour, available to purchase as an add-on to your main event ticket. Mega Night is a ticketed evening event, taking place after the main daytime Pokémon GO Tour event.
Look forward to unique gameplay, special entertainment and more during this “after hours” extravaganza!
All event gameplay is exclusive to Mega Night ticket holders.
Please note: You will only be able to experience the event gameplay within Rose Bowl Stadium and Brookside Golf Course during the date and time noted on your add-on ticket.

Pokémon GO Tour.title: Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos - Global 2026

bonuses: 1/2 Hatch Distance for Eggs placed in Incubators during the event
1/2 Stardust cost for trades
Increased chance of encountering Shiny Pokémon*
Mega-Evolved Pokémon will receive a CP boost
One GO Snapshot surprise event encounter per day—Latias may appear on Saturday and Latios may appear on Sunday!
Up to six Special Trades per day

Pokémon GO Tour.description:
Other Event Locations:
- Los Angeles
- Tainan
- Global (this page)
Buy tickets: Pokémon GO Web Store
Join millions of Trainers across the globe for Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos – Global! Take part in this worldwide event inspired by the Kalos region, first featured in Pokémon X and Pokémon Y on the Nintendo 3DS.
Get ready to experience new gameplay inspired by the stories and characters of Pokémon X and Pokémon Y. From longtime Kalos fans to new Trainers picking up Pokémon GO for the first time, anyone can take part in this exciting two-day event at no cost!
Looking to enhance your GO Tour adventure with exclusive Special Research, additional bonuses, and an increased chance of encountering Shiny Pokémon? Purchase a global event ticket from the Pokémon GO Web Store!

Season.title: Precious Paths

bonuses: Increased Stardust for the first catch of the day
Increased friendship bonus damage dealt by Pokémon in raids
One additional Special Trade per day

Season.description: Welcome to the next Pokémon GO Season: Precious Paths!
